name: Catena® 4470 Node with Modbus
_categoryNote: Soil-monitor was not declared: the only upstream example is the port 1 format 0x14 (air-only) record. The codec does decode the soil-bearing formats 0x11/0x15 (soil.moisture + soil.temperature), but no upstream-grade vector exercises them, so the category is intentionally omitted per AUTHORING coverage rules.
